prompt: `import spyglass.common` now fails with `AttributeError: module 'cv2' has no attribute 'gapi'`. Worked yesterday. I pip installed `opencv-python-headless` for another project into the same conda env last night — is that related? How do I get back to working?
behavioral_checks: Identifies the pip-install-broke-conda-env pattern (not a spyglass code issue)

Recommends recreating the env from `environments/environment_min.yml` (the default minimal file per setup_install.md) or `environments/environment.yml` (full install) using either `mamba env update --prune` or `conda env update --prune` (either tool is acceptable — labs use both)
Mentions `pip install --dry-run` as a future safeguard
Does not recommend pinning a specific cv2 version or installing another package on top
